top_signals.title: Opposition to data centers grows in cramped urban Japan
top_signals.summary: The explosion in resource-hungry data centers — housing the hardware "brains" of artificial intelligence — is fueling unease worldwide.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: CryptoQuant says Strategy still needs disciplined bitcoin buying and selling framework
top_signals.summary: CryptoQuant said Michael Saylor's Strategy still needs still needs clearer rules for when to buy and sell bitcoin.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Chip Stocks Slide Into Bear Market in AI Unwind: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: A selloff in chipmakers gathered pace, driving the high-profile group of stocks to a bear market on worries that the artificial-intelligence spending spree is becoming harder to justify.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: To stay cool, wear flowing robes and throw water around? Yes, says science.
top_signals.summary: Long before air conditioning, people around the world came up with ingenious ways to beat the heat.
